rules.rule: Items must have role=tab with aria-selected
rules.check: Each .content-switcher__item must have role="tab" and aria-selected="true" or aria-selected="false"

rules.rule: Exactly one item must be selected at all times
rules.check: Exactly one .content-switcher__item must have aria-selected="true" at any given time
Active item must have tabindex="0"; all other items must have tabindex="-1"
.content-switcher__item must be a <button> element (or <a> with href if navigation-only)

rules.rule: No hardcoded color values in component CSS
rules.check: Component CSS must not contain hex, rgba, rgb, or hsl values. Use component-level tokens only.

rules.rule: All template classes must exist in CSS
rules.check: Every class used in template.html must have a corresponding rule in content-switcher.css

rules.rule: Component-level tokens must be defined in token.css
rules.check: All --content-switcher-* tokens referenced in CSS must be defined
rules.notes: Currently all tokens are missing — see analysis.md for proposed mappings

rules.rule: Focus ring must be visible on keyboard focus
rules.check: Focused item must show a visible focus indicator that meets WCAG 2.4.11 (3:1 contrast ratio, minimum area)

rules.rule: Focus ring must not be suppressed on pointer click
rules.check: :focus-visible is used, not :focus, to ensure ring appears only on keyboard navigation
Container must have exactly one of: content-switcher--sm, content-switcher--md, content-switcher--lg

rules.rule: RTL layout must use dir=rtl attribute, not a modifier class
rules.check: No .content-switcher--rtl class should exist. RTL is handled by dir=rtl on the element or ancestor.

rules.rule: Items may use aria-controls to link to panels
rules.check: If content panels exist, each tab should have aria-controls pointing to the panel id
rules.notes: Advisory — required for full tablist pattern compliance

rules.rule: Hover delta must be visually distinct
rules.check: --content-switcher-item-bg-hovered must resolve to a value different from --content-switcher-item-bg-default
rules.notes: Currently both map to same primitive fallback #F3F4F6

rules.rule: Consider automatic activation vs manual activation
rules.check: In automatic mode, focus activates the tab. In manual mode, Enter/Space activates. Choose per context.
references: ARIA Tabs Pattern — Deciding Between Automatic and Manual Activation
